title.en: Top Demon Lord Moyue Demon Lord.

content.en:
Top Demon Lord Moyue Demon Lord.

She also found the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon, thinking that she could kill this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon with one move.

But when her arm turned into a tough blade, she attacked the body of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon with a single blow, shattering its scales, only to find that it could only shatter the surface of its body.

"The body of the Supreme Legend is complete, although it only has the third sequence of Supreme Dao rules on its body, and the realm is not high, but the defense is really strong!"

She wanted to continue attacking, but the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon's injuries were still recovering.

You must know that at this time, the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon itself has a very serious injury, but it has been injured, it is difficult to recover completely, and its strength is depleting.

But.

The Demon Lord of the Ink Moon was also shocked by the recovery speed of this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon.

"It's hard to kill!"

She kept attacking, and the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon was also desperately trying to escape.

Suddenly.

A top Legendary Dao Realm slammed into the Demon Lord of the Ink Moon.

Caught off guard, the Moyue Demon Lord was injured, but the injury was not serious.

"Mo Lin, you are looking for death!"

The Demon Lord of the Moon was furious and killed Mo Lin.

And the three-headed dragon of Chiyan took the opportunity to escape.

......

Ye Tian shuttled through the legendary ruins, looking for legendary creatures.

Suddenly.

His copying talent senses a powerful legendary creature, the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon.

Immediately, he shuttled through.

Soon, he intercepted the three-headed dragon of Red Flame.

However, as soon as he got into the fight, he noticed that something was wrong.

This Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon actually raised the body of the Supreme Legend to the realm of perfection, and its recovery ability was not right, but even so, it was still seriously injured, which shows what a terrible battle it received.

"It must have been severely damaged by other Legendary Dao Realm or Legendary Dao Void Demons, I must kill it as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian burned the origin battle, and other replica bodies nearby also came over.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian's strength had already surpassed this Chiyan three-headed dragon, and after he fought desperately, the injuries of this Chiyan three-headed dragon became more and more serious.

Soon.

Ye Tian's other copy bodies arrived and directly besieged this Chiyan three-headed dragon.

"Die!"

Under a series of attacks, this Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon was finally killed by Ye Tian.

Immediately, he took the corpse of the three-headed dragon of Chiyan and fled.

When other Legends to the Dao Realm and Legends to the Dao Void Demon came here, they were already one step too late.

......

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian killed two more Legendary-level creatures with top-level Legendary Blood, and six Legendary-level creatures with ordinary Legendary Blood.

At this point, it's hard to find legendary creatures.

Moreover, he also received a summons that there was already a legend that the Dao Realm had killed other supreme legendary-level creatures and obtained the blood of the supreme legend.

"It's no fun to stay in the legendary ruins, you have to get out!"

Ye Tian left the legendary ancient ruins.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian is back.

He began to extract the blood of those legends, and he first extracted the blood of ordinary legends.

With his second sequence to the realm of Dao Rules, it was very easy to extract the blood of legends.

One by one, the blood of legends was extracted, and then he began to extract the blood of the strongest legends in the body of the three-headed dragon of Chiyan.

But.

However, when his second sequence of supreme rules penetrated into the body of the Red Flame Three-headed Dragon and extracted the blood of the Supreme Legend, he found a treasure.

Airplanes!

A blood-red metal was taken out of the void in the heart of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon.

"This breath ......"

Ye Tian found that the aura of this piece of metal was similar to that strange statue!

So, he took out the strange statue, and compared it, the breath belonged to the same category, but it was not the same kind.

"Could it be that the recovery ability of the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon has something to do with it?"

Ye Tian guessed.

He first extracted the blood of the Legend of the Strongest, put it away, and then studied the blood-colored metal and the strange statue.

He felt that these two treasures were definitely not simple.

But what these two treasures were, he couldn't recognize.

Of course, it may be that he has less knowledge.

"I am now an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, I can check a lot of knowledge, go to the Inheritance Book Hall of the Innate Origin Alliance to check it, maybe there is a record of this. "

Ye Tian came to the Supreme Void, and the Inheritance Book Hall was here.

In the years that followed, he continued to inquire about various materials here, such as treasures at the level of the Legend to the Dao Realm, or a collection of higher-grade treasures, and so on.

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found the relevant record in a book of inherited knowledge.

"Innate Primordial Treasure !!"

From this inheritance of knowledge, it is known that the innate original treasure is a treasure that even the patriarchs are extremely eager for, and there is a legend that he obtained the innate original treasure in the Dao realm and later became a patriarch directly, and it was not announced until a long time later.

It can be said that getting an innate original treasure is almost equivalent to a complete rise.

Each of the innate primordial treasures is different, and the effects are also different, but there is no doubt that even the most spicy chicken innate primordial treasures can improve the strength a lot.

"Innate Primordial Treasure, I didn't expect the innate Primordial Treasure that the patriarch wanted to snatch, I got two ???? at once"

Ye Tian was shocked.

For a long time, in addition to obtaining the copy talent, he felt that his luck was not too good, and he was often killed by copying the talent, and many opportunities were piled up again and again by his life.

As a result, this time I went to the legendary ancient ruins, and directly obtained two innate original treasures, and did not pay a single life.

This is a blast of luck!

Subsequently.

He began to study these two innate primordial treasures.

The Innate Primordial Treasure is different, so there is no experience to study, and you have to try again and again to know the role of the Innate Primordial Treasure.

Some innate primordial treasures seem inconspicuous, but some elders have studied countless years and have researched new tricks, which will make the value of innate primordial treasures rise greatly.

So.

Without the innate original treasure of spicy chicken, it depends on whether you can develop the value of the innate original treasure.

Ye Tianxian focused on the blood-colored metal, and the Red Flame Three-Headed Dragon devoured it, and he also devoured this blood-colored metal.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian swallowed the blood-colored metal into his body and tried to refine it to study this blood-colored metal.

After a period of time, he found that he had initially refined this piece of blood-colored metal, which was equivalent to confessing the master.

After that, he continued to study and initially studied the first energy of the blood-colored metal, which was to recover from injuries.

The Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon developed this ability, and he had a control, so he naturally studied it very easily.

Not long after, Ye Tian also discovered that the blood-colored metal actually had an effect on improving the body of the strongest legend.
